transcript: Speaker A: ओ, तुम्हारी हिंदी तो बढ़िया है। [Oh, your Hindi is great.] Speaker B: हाँ? [Yes?] Speaker A: तुम MP से बोल रहे हो इसलिए पूछा। [I asked because you are speaking from MP.] Speaker B: सही तो यहाँ कितने दिनों से हो? [Right, so how many days have you been here?] Speaker A: आज मेरा तीसरा ही दिन है। [Today is only my third day.] Speaker B: लेकिन फिर भी तुम अच्छी इंग्लिश बोल रही हो। [But still, you are speaking good English.] Speaker A: क्योंकि यहाँ हर रोज़ बोलने की आदत लग जाती है। मज़ा भी आता है। [Because here you get into the habit of speaking every day. It's fun too.] Speaker B: हाँ, इंग्लिश क्लासेस से ये ज़्यादा यूज़फुल लग रहा है। [Yes, this feels more useful than English classes.] Speaker C: MySivi ऐप पर 1 करोड़ लोग एक दूसरे से बात करके स्पोकन इंग्लिश की प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। आप भी आज ही शुरू करें। ट्रायल सिर्फ़ ₹1 में। [On the MySivi app, 1 crore people are practicing spoken English by talking to each other. You should also start today. Trial for just ₹1.] Speaker D: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Rani. Akash. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. MySivi. MySivi AI Speak English. 10M+ Downloads. Install. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access. English speaking app. Install Now.
summary: The ad showcases a simulated voice call between two users on the MySivi app, highlighting how easy and fun it is to build a daily English speaking habit. It leverages social proof by mentioning over 10 million downloads and offers a premium trial for just 1 Rupee. The call to action prompts viewers to install the app.
